what_was_requested: Execute ETAP 2: Momentum Divergence Signal Feature workflow - validate, publish, and backtest cf_momentum_divergence feature
what_was_done: 1. Validated cf_momentum_divergence custom feature detecting 1h price-vs-RSI divergence (operation f55f9f84e3d9, completed successfully with 314 rows). 2. Published the feature (operation 2d34328ca64a, completed). 3. Built feature dataset BTCUSDT_1h with cf_momentum_divergence column (operation d7475bd0c9b3, 54,864 rows processed in 4s). 4. Cloned active-signal-v1 to research-momentum-divergence-v1. 5. Validated divergence signal logic (long: cf_momentum_divergence==1 + rsi in [0,1]; short: cf_momentum_divergence==-1 + rsi in [3,4]). 6. Saved strategy version 2 with divergence signals. 7. Ran backtest from 2025-01-01 to 2026-03-20 (run_id: 20260407-152230-ee0c596d). 8. Created research project etap2-momentum-divergence-signals-405675bb. 9. Recorded result with REJECT verdict. 10. Added cf_momentum_divergence feature and research-momentum-divergence-v1@2 snapshot to Gold Collection.
